title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — internal.config.kubernetes.io/path
text:
Type: Annotation
Example:
internal.config.kubernetes.io/path: "relative/file/path.yaml"
Used on: All objects
This annotation records the slash-delimited, OS-agnostic, relative path to the manifest file the
object was loaded from. The path is relative to a fixed location on the filesystem, determined by
the orchestrator tool.
This annotation is part of the Kubernetes Resource Model (KRM) Functions Specification, which is
used by Kustomize and similar third-party tools.
A KRM Function
should not
modify this annotation on input objects unless it is modifying the
referenced files. A KRM Function
may
include this annotation on objects it generates.
